x.name: ttt_x
x.comment: Set id to your custom emoji ID, or leave as 0 to use text X

o.name: ttt_o
o.comment: Set id to your custom emoji ID, or leave as 0 to use text O

blank.name: ttt_blank
blank.comment: Set id to your custom emoji ID, or leave as 0 for empty buttons

win.name: ttt_win
win.comment: Set id to your custom emoji ID, or leave as 0 to keep X/O on winning cells

instructions: To use custom emojis: 1) Upload emojis to your server, 2) Type \:emoji_name: in Discord to get the ID, 3) Replace the id values above with your emoji IDs
